name: HWR_PER_GBL_PRFL_VL
query: SELECT B.GBL_PRFL_ID, B.GENDER_CODE, B.EMAIL, B.MENTOR_STATUS, B.IMAGE_URL, B.GAMIFICATION_USER_ID, B.GAMIFICATION_PLAYER_ID, T.NAME, T.FIRST_NAME, T.MIDDLE_NAME, T.LAST_NAME, T.STREET_ADDRESS, T.PHONE, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_PER_GBL_PRFL_B B, HWR_PER_GBL_PRFL_TL T WHERE B.GBL_PRFL_ID = T.GBL_PRFL_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
